description_long: This is a slim, full-size keyboard with a black chassis and white key legends, featuring a standard QWERTY layout with a numeric keypad on the right. The keys are low-profile and evenly spaced, with clear, high-contrast labeling for easy visibility. The surface appears to be made of matte plastic, giving it a modern and professional look. The keyboard is slightly elevated at the back, likely for ergonomic typing comfort, and has a compact, lightweight build. A brand logo is visible in the upper right corner, indicating it is a Lenovo product. There are no visible cables or wireless receivers attached, suggesting it may be wireless or the connection is not shown.
description: A slim, black Lenovo full-size keyboard with white legends and a numeric keypad, featuring a modern, low-profile design.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the full key layout, including the numeric keypad and Lenovo logo.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the keyboard's slim profile and slight rear elevation.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the keyboard's thinness and the slight tilt from the back feet.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizing the low-profile keys and the keyboard's overall sleekness.
